title: Surgeon Vacancy at Jupiter Hospital - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Jupiter Hospital - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Jupiter Hospital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Surgeon to strengthen our Coimbatore-based team.

About Jupiter Hospital:
Jupiter Hospital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jupiter Hospital!
